Record.Property: This job reads from the source CREW_WSTELE_LND landing zone table and populates the target TE_EMPLOYEE_PHONE table in the Crew Data warehouse.

SubRecord.Property: Sets the pad character used when padding a string to a fixed length.

Record.Property: Add 1 to call priority as pivot index gets generated from 0. We have to get it from 1; also handle data validation
This stage reads from the source Teradata Landing table CREW_WSTELE_LND
This stage writes records into target Teradata warehouse table TE_EMPLOYEE_PHONE
This stage captures the Error records due to data issue in source system.
This stage trasform valid employee numbered data to different stages based on phone type
one employee record becomes 5 tele home priror sequence records and priorites are caluculated based on PIVOT column index
Add 5 to column index for 2nd set of FROM_TO combination
This Stage funnels all the 3 FROM_TO combination set of records
This stage transform all basic records if ph_nbr is not null,home_away_ind is not null or of type H,B and A to different output stages
This stage joins all basic records with home phone sequence priority
This stage gives the new call list priorities to the records generated till now
This stage get the max call priority value from the list of records
Joins basic records and max call prioroity
Calculate new priorities to the basic records
Funnels all phone types of records after getting their priorities
seperating different AWAY sequence based on from_to window

SubRecord.Property:
<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-16'?><Properties version='1.1'><Common><Context type='int'>1</Context><Variant type='string'>12</Variant><DescriptorVersion type='string'>1.0</DescriptorVersion><PartitionType type='int'>-1</PartitionType><RCP type='int'>0</RCP></Common><Connection><Server modified='1' type='string'><![CDATA[#ENV.$TD_SVR#]]></Server><Username modified='1' type='string'><![CDATA[#ENV.$TD_USER_ID#]]></Username><Password modified='1' type='string'><![CDATA[#ENV.$TD_PWD#]]></Password><Database modified='1' type='string'><![CDATA[#ENV.$TD_WORK_DB#]]></Database><TransactionMode type='int'><![CDATA[1]]></TransactionMode><ClientCharacterSet modified='1' type='string'><![CDATA[ASCII]]></ClientCharacterSet><AutoMapCharsetEncoding modified='1' type='bool'><![CDATA[0]]></AutoMapCharsetEncoding><NLSMapName modified='1' type='string'><![CDATA[ISO-8859-1]]></NLSMapName><MaxBytesPerCharacter modified='1' type='int'><![CDATA[1]]></MaxBytesPerCharacter><Queryband modified='1' type='string'><![CDATA[JOB_ID = DWCR0041;JOB_NAME=CREW_J_TE_EMPLOYEE_PHONE_DW;USER ID=#ENV.$TD_USER_ID#;]]><ReadFromFile collapsed='1' type='bool'><![CDATA[0]]></ReadFromFile></Queryband><LogOnMech modified='1' type='int'><![CDATA[1]]></LogOnMech></Connection><Usage><IsMigratedJob type='bool'><![CDATA[0]]></IsMigratedJob><GenerateSQL modified='1' type='bool'><![CDATA[0]]></GenerateSQL><EnableQuotedIDs type='bool'><![CDATA[0]]></EnableQuotedIDs><DescribeStringsInBytes type='bool'><![CDATA[0]]></DescribeStringsInBytes><AccessMethod type='int'><![CDATA[1]]></AccessMethod><SQL><SelectStatement collapsed='1' modified='1' type='string'><![CDATA[SELECT
/*EMERGENCY*/
TELE_EMP_NBR AS EMP_NBR ,TELE_LAST_UPDATED_BY AS USER_ID ,TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE ,TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME ,TELE_EMGR_PH_NAME AS PH_COMMENTS ,TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_EMGR_PH_AREA_CD) || TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_EMGR_PH_PREFIX) || TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_EMGR_PH_NUM) AS PH_NBR
/*TEMP*/
,TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_TEMP_PH_AREA_CD) || TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_TEMP_PH_PREFIX) || TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_TEMP_PH_NUM) AS TEMP_PH_NBR ,TELE_TEMP_PH_ACCESS AS TEMP_PH_ACCESS ,TELE_TEMP_PH_COMMENT AS TEMP_PH_COMMENTS ,TELE_TEMP_PH_DATE ,TELE_TEMP_PH_TIME
/*BASIC*/
,TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_PH_AREA_CD) || TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_PH_PREFIX) || TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_PH_NUM) AS BASIC_PH_NBR_1 ,TELE_PH_ACCESS AS BASIC_PH_ACCESS_1 ,TELE_PH_COMMENT AS BASIC_PH_COMMENTS_1 ,TELE_PH_TYPE AS BASIC_PH_TYPE_1 ,TELE_PH_UNLIST_CD AS BASIC_PH_UNLIST_CD_1 ,TELE_PH_HOME_AWAY_CD AS BASIC_PH_HOME_AWAY_CD_1
,TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_PH_AREA_CD_2) || TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_PH_PREFIX_2) || TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_PH_NUM_2) AS BASIC_PH_NBR_2 ,TELE_PH_ACCESS_2 AS BASIC_PH_ACCESS_2 ,TELE_PH_COMMENT_2 AS BASIC_PH_COMMENTS_2 ,TELE_PH_TYPE_2 AS BASIC_PH_TYPE_2 ,TELE_PH_UNLIST_CD_2 AS BASIC_PH_UNLIST_CD_2 ,TELE_PH_HOME_AWAY_CD_2 AS BASIC_PH_HOME_AWAY_CD_2
,TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_PH_AREA_CD_3) || TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_PH_PREFIX_3) || TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_PH_NUM_3) AS BASIC_PH_NBR_3 ,TELE_PH_ACCESS_3 AS BASIC_PH_ACCESS_3 ,TELE_PH_COMMENT_3 AS BASIC_PH_COMMENTS_3 ,TELE_PH_TYPE_3 AS BASIC_PH_TYPE_3 ,TELE_PH_UNLIST_CD_3 AS BASIC_PH_UNLIST_CD_3 ,TELE_PH_HOME_AWAY_CD_3 AS BASIC_PH_HOME_AWAY_CD_3
,TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_PH_AREA_CD_4) || TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_PH_PREFIX_4) || TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_PH_NUM_4) AS BASIC_PH_NBR_4 ,TELE_PH_ACCESS_4 AS BASIC_PH_ACCESS_4 ,TELE_PH_COMMENT_4 AS BASIC_PH_COMMENTS_4 ,TELE_PH_TYPE_4 AS BASIC_PH_TYPE_4 ,TELE_PH_UNLIST_CD_4 AS BASIC_PH_UNLIST_CD_4 ,TELE_PH_HOME_AWAY_CD_4 AS BASIC_PH_HOME_AWAY_CD_4
,TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_PH_AREA_CD_5) || TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_PH_PREFIX_5) || TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TELE_PH_NUM_5) AS BASIC_PH_NBR_5 ,TELE_PH_ACCESS_5 AS BASIC_PH_ACCESS_5 ,TELE_PH_COMMENT_5 AS BASIC_PH_COMMENTS_5 ,TELE_PH_TYPE_5 AS BASIC_PH_TYPE_5 ,TELE_PH_UNLIST_CD_5 AS BASIC_PH_UNLIST_CD_5 ,TELE_PH_HOME_AWAY_CD_5 AS BASIC_PH_HOME_AWAY_CD_5
/*HOME*/
,TELE_HOME_PRI_FROM AS TELE_HOME_PRI_FROM_1 ,TELE_HOME_PRI_TO AS TELE_HOME_PRI_TO_1 ,TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ AS TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_1_1 ,TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_2 AS TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_2_1 ,TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_3 AS TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_3_1 ,TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_4 AS TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_4_1 ,TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_5 AS TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_5_1
,TELE_HOME_PRI_FROM_2 ,TELE_HOME_PRI_TO_2 ,TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_6 AS TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_1_2 ,TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_2_2 ,TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_3_2 ,TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_4_2 ,TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_5_2
,TELE_HOME_PRI_FROM_3 ,TELE_HOME_PRI_TO_3 ,TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_7 AS TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_1_3 ,TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_2_3 ,TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_3_3 ,TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_4_3 ,TELE_HOME_PRI_SEQ_5_3
/*AWAY*/
,TELE_AWAY_PRI_FROM AS TELE_AWAY_PRI_FROM_1 ,TELE_AWAY_PRI_TO AS TELE_AWAY_PRI_TO_1 ,TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ AS TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_1_1 ,TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_2 AS TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_2_1 ,TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_3 AS TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_3_1 ,TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_4 AS TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_4_1 ,TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_5 AS TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_5_1
,TELE_AWAY_PRI_FROM_2 ,TELE_AWAY_PRI_TO_2 ,TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_6 AS TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_1_2 ,TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_2_2 ,TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_3_2 ,TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_4_2 ,TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_5_2
,TELE_AWAY_PRI_FROM_3 ,TELE_AWAY_PRI_TO_3 ,TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_7 AS TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_1_3 ,TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_2_3 ,TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_3_3 ,TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_4_3 ,TELE_AWAY_PRI_SEQ_5_3
FROM #ENV.$TD_WORK_DB#.CREW_WSTELE_LND
/*WHERE TELE_EMP_NBR='000733621'*/]]><Tables collapsed='1'></Tables><Parameters collapsed='1'></Parameters><Columns collapsed='1'></Columns></SelectStatement></SQL><Transaction><RecordCount modified='1' type='int'><![CDATA[3000]]></RecordCount><EndOfWave collapsed='1' type='int'><![CDATA[0]]></EndOfWave></Transaction><Session><IsolationLevel type='int'><![CDATA[1]]></IsolationLevel><ArraySize modified='1' type='int'><![CDATA[1000]]></ArraySize><SchemaReconciliation><FailOnSizeMismatch type='bool'><![CDATA[1]]></FailOnSizeMismatch><FailOnTypeMismatch type='bool'><![CDATA[1]]></FailOnTypeMismatch></SchemaReconciliation><PassLobLocator collapsed='1' type='bool'><![CDATA[0]]></PassLobLocator></Session><BeforeAfter collapsed='1' type='bool'><![CDATA[0]]></BeforeAfter><LimitSettings><MaxBufferSize type='int'><![CDATA[0]]></MaxBufferSize><ProgressInterval type='int'><![CDATA[100000]]></ProgressInterval></LimitSettings><ParallelSynchronization collapsed='1' type='bool'><![CDATA[0]]></ParallelSynchronization><LimitRows collapsed='1' type='bool'><![CDATA[0]]></LimitRows></Usage></Properties >

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-16'?><Properties version='1.1'><Common><Context type='int'>2</Context><Variant type='string'>12</Variant><DescriptorVersion type='int'><![CDATA[1]]></MaxBytesPerCharacter><Queryband modified='1' type='string'><![CDATA[JOB_ID = DWCR0041;JOB_NAME=CREW_J_TE_EMPLOYEE_PHONE_DW;USER ID=#ENV.$TD_USER_ID#;]]><ReadFromFile collapsed='1' type='bool'><![CDATA[0]]></ReadFromFile></Queryband><LogOnMech modified='1' type='int'><![CDATA[1]]></LogOnMech></Connection><Usage><IsMigratedJob type='string'><![CDATA[TE_EMPLOYEE_PHONE_NEW]]></TableName><EnableQuotedIDs type='bool'><![CDATA[0]]></EnableQuotedIDs><AccessMethod type='int'><![CDATA[1]]></AccessMethod><SQL></SQL><TableAction modified='1' type='int'><![CDATA[3]]><GenerateTruncateStatement type='bool'><![CDATA[1]]><FailOnError type='bool'><![CDATA[1]]></FailOnError></GenerateTruncateStatement></TableAction><Transaction><RecordCount modified='1' type='int'><![CDATA[4000]]></RecordCount></Transaction><Session><ArraySize type='int'><![CDATA[2000]]></ArraySize><SchemaReconciliation><UnusedFieldAction type='int'><![CDATA[1]]></UnusedFieldAction></SchemaReconciliation><PassLobLocator collapsed='1' type='bool'><![CDATA[0]]></PassLobLocator></Session><TargetTemporalSupport collapsed='1' type='bool'><![CDATA[0]]></TargetTemporalSupport><Logging><LogColumnValues collapsed='1' type='bool'><![CDATA[0]]></LogColumnValues></Logging><BeforeAfter modified='1' type='bool'><![CDATA[1]]><before type='string'><![CDATA[]]><FailOnError type='bool'><![CDATA[1]]></FailOnError></before><after modified='1' type='string'><![CDATA[DELETE FROM #ENV.$TD_DB#.TE_EMPLOYEE_PHONE;
INSERT INTO #ENV.$TD_DB#.TE_EMPLOYEE_PHONE SELECT EMP_NBR,EMP_NO,PH_LIST,PH_PRTY,EFF_START_TM,EFF_END_TM,PH_NBR,PH_ACCESS,PH_COMMENTS,PH_TYPE,UNLISTD_IND,HOME_AWAY_IND,TEMP_PH_EXP_TS,TD_LD_TS FROM #ENV.$TD_WORK_DB#.TE_EMPLOYEE_PHONE_NEW;]]><FailOnError type='bool'><![CDATA[1]]></FailOnError></after><beforeNode type='string'><![CDATA[]]><FailOnError type='bool'><![CDATA[1]]></FailOnError></beforeNode><afterNode type='string'><![CDATA[]]><FailOnError type='bool'><![CDATA[1]]></FailOnError></afterNode><BeforeSQLFile type='string'><![CDATA[]]><FailOnError type='bool'><![CDATA[1]]></FailOnError></BeforeSQLFile><AfterSQLFile type='string'><![CDATA[]]><FailOnError type='bool'><![CDATA[1]]></FailOnError></AfterSQLFile></BeforeAfter><ImmediateAccess collapsed='1'></ImmediateAccess><LimitSettings><MaxBufferSize type='int'><![CDATA[0]]></MaxBufferSize><StartRow type='int'><![CDATA[0]]></StartRow><EndRow type='int'><![CDATA[0]]></EndRow><ProgressInterval type='int'><![CDATA[100000]]></ProgressInterval></LimitSettings><ParallelSynchronization collapsed='1' type='bool'><![CDATA[0]]></ParallelSynchronization><TMSMEVENTS type='bool'><![CDATA[0]]></TMSMEVENTS><Reconnect collapsed='1' type='bool'><![CDATA[0]]></Reconnect><Disconnect collapsed='1' type='int'><![CDATA[0]]></Disconnect></Usage></Properties >

\(20)if TrimLeadingTrailing(( IF IsNotNull((ALL_REC_OUT_FNL.PH_ACCESS)) THEN (ALL_REC_OUT_FNL.PH_ACCESS) ELSE (''))) = '' or TrimLeadingTrailing(( IF IsNotNull((ALL_REC_OUT_FNL.PH_ACCESS)) THEN (ALL_REC_OUT_FNL.PH_ACCESS) ELSE (''))) < ' ' then setnull() else TrimLeadingTrailing(( IF IsNotNull((ALL_REC_OUT_FNL.PH_ACCESS)) THEN (ALL_REC_OUT_FNL.PH_ACCESS) ELSE ('')))

\(20)if TrimLeadingTrailing(( IF IsNotNull((ALL_REC_OUT_FNL.PH_COMMENTS)) THEN (ALL_REC_OUT_FNL.PH_COMMENTS) ELSE (''))) = '' or TrimLeadingTrailing(( IF IsNotNull((ALL_REC_OUT_FNL.PH_COMMENTS)) THEN (ALL_REC_OUT_FNL.PH_COMMENTS) ELSE (''))) < ' ' then setnull() else TrimLeadingTrailing(( IF IsNotNull((ALL_REC_OUT_FNL.PH_COMMENTS)) THEN (ALL_REC_OUT_FNL.PH_COMMENTS) ELSE ('')))

BASIC_REC_TFM WARNING: Error in output column derivation expression for column CALL_PRTY in link ALL_BREC_OUT_TFM. - potential data or precision loss converting from int32 to int16 WARNING: Error in output column derivation expression for column CALL_PRTY in link CALL_PRIORITY_RIGHT_JNR. - potential data or precision loss converting from int32 to int16 WARNING: Error in output column derivation expression for column CALL_PRTY in link BREC_OUT_TFM. - potential data or precision loss converting from int32 to int16 WARNING: Error in output column derivation expression for column CALL_PRTY in link CALL_PRI_RIGHT_JNR. - potential data or precision loss converting from int32 to int16 WARNING: Error in output column derivation expression for column CALL_PRTY in link BASIC_REC_OUT_TFM. - potential data or precision loss converting from int32 to int16

Record.Property: isvalid("int64", BREC_OUT_PVT.PH_NBR) and not(isnull(BREC_OUT_PVT.HOME_AWAY_IND)) and (((BREC_OUT_PVT.HOME_AWAY_IND)) = 'B' or ((BREC_OUT_PVT.HOME_AWAY_IND)) = 'H')
isvalid("int64", BREC_OUT_PVT.PH_NBR) and not(isnull(BREC_OUT_PVT.HOME_AWAY_IND)) and (((BREC_OUT_PVT.HOME_AWAY_IND)) = 'B' or ((BREC_OUT_PVT.HOME_AWAY_IND)) = 'H')
isvalid("int64", BREC_OUT_PVT.PH_NBR) and not(isnull(BREC_OUT_PVT.HOME_AWAY_IND)) and (((BREC_OUT_PVT.HOME_AWAY_IND)) = 'B' or ((BREC_OUT_PVT.HOME_AWAY_IND)) = 'A')
isvalid("int64", BREC_OUT_PVT.PH_NBR) and not(isnull(BREC_OUT_PVT.HOME_AWAY_IND)) and (((BREC_OUT_PVT.HOME_AWAY_IND)) = 'B' or ((BREC_OUT_PVT.HOME_AWAY_IND)) = 'A')

SubRecord.Property: SEPARATE_PHTYPE_TFM WARNING: Error in output column derivation expression for column EMP_NBR in link EMERGENCY_IN_TFM. - potential data or precision loss converting from string to int32 WARNING: Error in output column derivation expression for column CALL_PRTY in link EMERGENCY_IN_TFM. - potential data or precision loss converting from int32 to int16 WARNING: Error in output column derivation expression for column EMP_NBR in link TEMP_TYPE_TFM. - potential data or precision loss converting from string to int32 WARNING: Error in output column derivation expression for column CALL_PRTY in link TEMP_TYPE_TFM. - potential data or precision loss converting from int32 to int16 WARNING: Error in output column derivation expression for column EMP_NBR in link BASIC_TYPE_TFM. - potential data or precision loss converting from string to int32

IF TRIMLEADINGTRAILING(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE)='' OR TRIMLEADINGTRAILING(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME)='' THEN SETNULL() ELSE IF NOT(ISVALID("TIMESTAMP",'20':LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE,2):'-':RIGHT(LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE,4),2):'-':RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE,2):' ':LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME,2):':':RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME,2):':00')) THEN SETNULL() ELSE '20':LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE,2):'-':RIGHT(LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE,4),2):'-':RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE,2):' ':LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME,2):':':RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME,2):':00'

\(20)IF TRIMLEADINGTRAILING(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE) = '' OR TRIMLEADINGTRAILING(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME) = '' THEN SETNULL() ELSE IF NOT(ISVALID("TIMESTAMP", '20' : LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE, 2) : '-' : RIGHT(LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE, 4), 2) : '-' : RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE, 2) : ' ' : LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME, 2) : ':' : RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME, 2) : ':00')) THEN SETNULL() ELSE '20' : LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE, 2) : '-' : RIGHT(LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE, 4), 2) : '-' : RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE, 2) : ' ' : LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME, 2) : ':' : RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME, 2) : ':00'

IF TRIMLEADINGTRAILING(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_DATE)='' OR TRIMLEADINGTRAILING(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_TIME)='' THEN SETNULL() ELSE IF NOT(ISVALID("TIMESTAMP",'20':LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_DATE,2):'-':RIGHT(LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_DATE,4),2):'-':RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_DATE,2):' ':LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_TIME,2):':':RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_TIME,2):':00')) THEN SETNULL() ELSE '20':LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_DATE,2):'-':RIGHT(LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_DATE,4),2):'-':RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_DATE,2):' ':LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_TIME,2):':':RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_TIME,2):':00'

\(20)IF TRIMLEADINGTRAILING(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_DATE) = '' OR TRIMLEADINGTRAILING(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_TIME) = '' THEN SETNULL() ELSE IF NOT(ISVALID("TIMESTAMP", '20' : LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_DATE, 2) : '-' : RIGHT(LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_DATE, 4), 2) : '-' : RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_DATE, 2) : ' ' : LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_TIME, 2) : ':' : RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_TIME, 2) : ':00')) THEN SETNULL() ELSE '20' : LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_DATE, 2) : '-' : RIGHT(LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_DATE, 4), 2) : '-' : RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_DATE, 2) : ' ' : LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_TIME, 2) : ':' : RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_TEMP_PH_TIME, 2) : ':00'

IF TRIMLEADINGTRAILING(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE)='' OR TRIMLEADINGTRAILING(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME)='' THEN SETNULL() ELSE IF NOT(ISVALID("TIMESTAMP",'20':LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE,2):'-':RIGHT(LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE,4),2):'-':RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE,2):' ':LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME,2):':':RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME,2):':00')) THEN SETNULL() ELSE '20':LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE,2):'-':RIGHT(LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE,4),2):'-':RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE,2):' ':LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME,2):':':RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME,2):':00'

\(20)IF TRIMLEADINGTRAILING(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE) = '' OR TRIMLEADINGTRAILING(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME) = '' THEN SETNULL() ELSE IF NOT(ISVALID("TIMESTAMP", '20' : LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE, 2) : '-' : RIGHT(LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE, 4), 2) : '-' : RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE, 2) : ' ' : LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME, 2) : ':' : RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME, 2) : ':00')) THEN SETNULL() ELSE '20' : LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE, 2) : '-' : RIGHT(LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE, 4), 2) : '-' : RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE, 2) : ' ' : LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME, 2) : ':' : RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME, 2) : ':00'

IF TRIMLEADINGTRAILING(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE)='' OR TRIMLEADINGTRAILING(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME)='' THEN SETNULL() ELSE IF NOT(ISVALID("TIMESTAMP",'20':LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE,2):'-':RIGHT(LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE,4),2):'-':RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE,2):' ':LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME,2):':':RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME,2):':00')) THEN SETNULL() ELSE '20':LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE,2):'-':RIGHT(LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE,4),2):'-':RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE,2):' ':LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME,2):':':RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME,2):':00'

\(20)IF TRIMLEADINGTRAILING(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE) = '' OR TRIMLEADINGTRAILING(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME) = '' THEN SETNULL() ELSE IF NOT(ISVALID("TIMESTAMP", '20' : LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE, 2) : '-' : RIGHT(LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE, 4), 2) : '-' : RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE, 2) : ' ' : LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME, 2) : ':' : RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME, 2) : ':00')) THEN SETNULL() ELSE '20' : LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE, 2) : '-' : RIGHT(LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE, 4), 2) : '-' : RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_DATE, 2) : ' ' : LEFT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME, 2) : ':' : RIGHT(LNK_OUT_TDC.TELE_LAST_UPDATED_TIME, 2) : ':00'

INC_PRTY_TFM WARNING: Error in output column derivation expression for column EMP_NBR in link CALL_PRIORITY_LEFT_JNR. - potential data or precision loss converting from string to int32 WARNING: Error in output column derivation expression for column CALL_PRTY in link CALL_PRIORITY_LEFT_JNR. - potential data or precision loss converting from int32 to int16 WARNING: Error in output column derivation expression for column LKP_CALL_PRTY in link CALL_PRIORITY_LEFT_JNR. - potential data or precision loss converting from string to int32

\(20)if not(isvalid("time", left(HSEQ_OUT_FNL.TELE_HOME_PRI_FROM, 2) : ':' : right(HSEQ_OUT_FNL.TELE_HOME_PRI_FROM, 2) : ':00')) then setnull() else trimleadingtrailing(HSEQ_OUT_FNL.TELE_HOME_PRI_FROM)
\(20)if not(isvalid("time", left(HSEQ_OUT_FNL.TELE_HOME_PRI_TO, 2) : ':' : right(HSEQ_OUT_FNL.TELE_HOME_PRI_TO, 2) : ':00')) then setnull() else trimleadingtrailing(HSEQ_OUT_FNL.TELE_HOME_PRI_TO)

NEW_PRTY_TFM WARNING: Error in Stage Variable initial value expression for variable svCalcNew. - potential data or precision loss converting from int32 to int16 WARNING: Error in Stage Variable initial value expression for variable svCalcOld. - potential data or precision loss converting from int32 to int16 WARNING: Error in Stage Variable derivation expression for variable svCalcNew. - potential data or precision loss converting from int32 to int16
if svEmpNbrNew <> svEmpNbrOld then 1 else svCalcOld + 1

if svEmpNbrNew <> svEmpNbrOld then BMAX_OUT_JNR.MAX_CALL_PRTY + 1 else svCalcOld + 1
\(20)if svEmpNbrNew <> svEmpNbrOld then BMAX_OUT_JNR.MAX_CALL_PRTY + 1 else svCalcOld + 1

if svEmpNbrNew <> svEmpNbrOld then DSLink85.MAX_CALL_PRTY + 1 else svCalcOld + 1
\(20)if svEmpNbrNew <> svEmpNbrOld then DSLink85.MAX_CALL_PRTY + 1 else svCalcOld + 1

Record.Property: one employee record becomes second 5 record set out of 15 record combination and priorites are caluculated based on PIVOT column index
one employee record becomes third 5 record set out of 15 record combination and priorites are caluculated based on PIVOT column index
Add 10 to column index for 2nd set of FROM_TO combination
one employee record becomes 5 records of columns ph_access,ph_comment,ph_type,ph_unlist_cd,ph_home_away_cd,temp_ph_exp_ts,ph_nbr, priorites are caluculated based on PIVOT column index
Calculate new priorities to the basic records
Joins basic records and max call prioroity
This stage get the max call priority value from the list of records
This stage gives the new call list priorities to the records generated till now
This stage joins all basic records with home phone sequence priority
Add 1 to call priority as pivot index gets generated from 0. We have to get it from 1; also handle data validation
seperating different HOME sequence based on from_to window
one employee record becomes third 5 record set out of 15 record combination and priorites are caluculated based on PIVOT column index
one employee record becomes second 5 record set out of 15 record combination and priorites are caluculated based on PIVOT column index
one employee record becomes 5 tele home priror sequence records and priorites are caluculated based on PIVOT column index
Add 5 to column index for 2nd set of FROM_TO combination
Add 10 to column index for 2nd set of FROM_TO combination
This Stage funnels all the 3 FROM_TO combination set of records

\(20)if not(isvalid("time", left(ASEQ_OUT_FNL.TELE_HOME_PRI_FROM, 2) : ':' : right(ASEQ_OUT_FNL.TELE_HOME_PRI_FROM, 2) : ':00')) then setnull() else trimleadingtrailing(ASEQ_OUT_FNL.TELE_HOME_PRI_FROM)
\(20)if not(isvalid("time", left(ASEQ_OUT_FNL.TELE_HOME_PRI_TO, 2) : ':' : right(ASEQ_OUT_FNL.TELE_HOME_PRI_TO, 2) : ':00')) then setnull() else trimleadingtrailing(ASEQ_OUT_FNL.TELE_HOME_PRI_TO)

ABREC_NEW_PRTY_TFM WARNING: Error in Stage Variable initial value expression for variable svCalcNew. - potential data or precision loss converting from int32 to int16 WARNING: Error in Stage Variable initial value expression for variable svCalcOld. - potential data or precision loss converting from int32 to int16 WARNING: Error in Stage Variable derivation expression for variable svCalcNew. - potential data or precision loss converting from int32 to int16
if svEmpNbrNew <> svEmpNbrOld then 1 else svCalcOld + 1
